result.stderr:
Incrementalist.Cmd 1.2.0+3a828c90b6ec48c4ef3e51d5a56f1aaaaf172483
Copyright © 2015-2025 Petabridge

  run                      Run a command against affected projects. Use the
                           `--dry` option to test without executing.

  list-affected-folders    List affected folders instead of .NET projects.

  create-config            Create a new configuration file with current options.

  run-process              Run a custom process against affected projects.
                           Allows specifying the process to start and its
                           arguments. Useful for non-dotnet commands or scripts.

  help                     Display more information on a specific command.

  version                  Display version information.

commands.payload:
Incrementalist.Cmd 1.2.0+3a828c90b6ec48c4ef3e51d5a56f1aaaaf172483
Copyright © 2015-2025 Petabridge

  run                      Run a command against affected projects. Use the
                           `--dry` option to test without executing.

  list-affected-folders    List affected folders instead of .NET projects.

  create-config            Create a new configuration file with current options.

  run-process              Run a custom process against affected projects.
                           Allows specifying the process to start and its
                           arguments. Useful for non-dotnet commands or scripts.

result.stderr:
Incrementalist.Cmd 1.2.0+3a828c90b6ec48c4ef3e51d5a56f1aaaaf172483
Copyright © 2015-2025 Petabridge

  -s, --sln                      The name of the Solution file to be analyzed by
                                 Incrementalist. Defaults to '*.sln' in the
                                 current directory.

  -f, --file                     If specified, writes the output to the named
                                 file.

  -b, --branch                   The git branch to compare against, i.e. 'dev'
                                 or 'master'.

  -d, --dir                      Specify the working directory explicitly.
                                 Defaults to using the current working
                                 directory.

  --verbose                      (Default: false) Prints out extensive debug
                                 logs during operation.

  -t, --timeout                  (Default: 2) Specifies the load timeout for the
                                 solution in whole minutes. Defaults to 2
                                 minutes.

  -c, --config                   Path to the configuration file. Defaults to
                                 .incrementalist/incrementalist.json in the
                                 current directory.

  --continue-on-error            (Default: true) When running commands, continue
                                 executing even if some commands fail.

  --parallel                     (Default: false) When running commands, execute
                                 them in parallel.

  --parallel-limit               (Default: 0) When running commands, the number
                                 of parallel projects to run.

  --fail-on-no-projects          (Default: false) When running commands, fail if
                                 no projects are affected.

  --skip-glob                    Glob pattern to exclude projects from the final
                                 list. Applied after analyzing dependencies.

  --target-glob                  Glob pattern to include only matching projects
                                 in the final list. Applied after analyzing
                                 dependencies.

  --name-application-to-start    (Default: dotnet) The application or document
                                 to start the process.

  --help                         Display this help screen.

  --version                      Display version information.

Incrementalist.Cmd 1.2.0+3a828c90b6ec48c4ef3e51d5a56f1aaaaf172483
Copyright © 2015-2025 Petabridge

  --dry                          Performs a dry run without executing any
                                 commands. Useful for testing.

  --engine                       (Default: StaticGraph) The engine used to
                                 analyze the solutions and projects. Either
                                 StaticGraph or Workspace

  -s, --sln                      The name of the Solution file to be analyzed by
                                 Incrementalist. Defaults to '*.sln' in the
                                 current directory.

  -f, --file                     If specified, writes the output to the named
                                 file.

  -b, --branch                   The git branch to compare against, i.e. 'dev'
                                 or 'master'.

  -d, --dir                      Specify the working directory explicitly.
                                 Defaults to using the current working
                                 directory.

  --verbose                      (Default: false) Prints out extensive debug
                                 logs during operation.

  -t, --timeout                  (Default: 2) Specifies the load timeout for the
                                 solution in whole minutes. Defaults to 2
                                 minutes.

  -c, --config                   Path to the configuration file. Defaults to
                                 .incrementalist/incrementalist.json in the
                                 current directory.

  --continue-on-error            (Default: true) When running commands, continue
                                 executing even if some commands fail.

  --parallel                     (Default: false) When running commands, execute
                                 them in parallel.

  --parallel-limit               (Default: 0) When running commands, the number
                                 of parallel projects to run.

  --fail-on-no-projects          (Default: false) When running commands, fail if
                                 no projects are affected.

  --skip-glob                    Glob pattern to exclude projects from the final
                                 list. Applied after analyzing dependencies.

  --target-glob                  Glob pattern to include only matching projects
                                 in the final list. Applied after analyzing
                                 dependencies.

  --name-application-to-start    (Default: dotnet) The application or document
                                 to start the process.

  --help                         Display this help screen.

  --version                      Display version information.
